name: HR_GEN_AI_PROMPTS_SEED_VL
query: SELECT B.PROMPT_TMPL_AI_ID, B.BO_HIERARCHY_CLASSPATH, B.PROMPT_CODE PROMPT_CODE, B.PROMPT_TMPL_VERSION, B.ENABLED_FLAG, B.USE_CASE_ID USE_CASE_ID, B.PROMPT PROMPT, B.PROMPT_TMPL, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, B.FAMILY FAMILY, B.PRODUCT PRODUCT, B.AVAILABLE_TOKENS, B.MODEL_CODE, B.MODEL_VERSION, B.MODEL_PROVIDER, B.CONFIGURABLE, B.PERSIST_DATA, B.LANGUAGE_OPT_IN, B.EXTRA_PROPERTIES, T.LABEL LABEL, T.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION FROM HR_GEN_AI_PROMPTS_SEED_B B, HR_GEN_AI_PROMPTS_SEED_TL T WHERE B.PROMPT_TMPL_AI_ID=T.PROMPT_TMPL_AI_ID AND T.LANGUAGE=USERENV('LANG')
